title: deguelia malaccensis
intro: Deguelia malaccensis, also known as the Malayan deguelia, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deguelia malaccensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
